# dependencytrack_permissions (Data Source)

Fetch available permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dependencytrack_permissions" "example" {}

output "permissions" {
  value = data.dependencytrack_permissions.example.permissions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `permissions` (Attributes List) List of available permissions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--permissions))

<a id="nestedatt--permissions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `permissions`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description of the permission.
- `name` (String) Name of the permission.
